Meta.titleDefault: VYDA Restaurant — Vietnamese restaurant in Trondheim
Meta.description: VYDA Restaurant serves authentic Vietnamese food in the heart of Trondheim. Phở, bún, spring rolls, wok dishes, vegetarian and children's options.
Meta.menuDescription: The full menu at VYDA Restaurant: starters, phở, bún, wok dishes, duck and lamb, vegetarian and children's options.
Meta.contactDescription: Address, opening hours and contact information for VYDA Restaurant in Trondheim.

Home.heroHeading: Authentic Vietnamese flavors, in the heart of the city.
Home.heroBody: Phở, bún, fresh spring rolls and warm wok dishes. Made from scratch, served with heart.
Home.phoneNote: Tables and takeaway are booked by phone.
Home.heroImageAlt: Phở Bò — Vietnamese rice noodle soup with beef and fresh herbs
